mapper.select:
SELECT id, tcm_syndrome_id, syndrome_name_zh, syndrome_english, syndrome_pinyin, syndrome_definition_zh, syndrome_description_en, category_zh, category_en, source FROM tcm_syndromes
AND ( syndrome_name_zh LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR syndrome_pinyin LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR syndrome_english LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND category_zh LIKE CONCAT('%', #{category}, '%')
ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id, tcm_syndrome_id, syndrome_name_zh, syndrome_english, syndrome_pinyin, syndrome_definition_zh, syndrome_description_en, category_zh, category_en, source FROM tcm_syndromes WHERE tcm_syndrome_id = #{tcmSyndromeId}

SELECT s.id, s.tcm_symptom_id AS tcmSymptomId, s.symptom_name_zh AS symptomNameZh, s.symptom_pinyin AS symptomPinyin, s.symptom_definition AS symptomDefinition, s.symptom_locus AS symptomLocus, s.symptom_property AS symptomProperty, s.type FROM tcm_symptoms s INNER JOIN syndrome_symptom_rel ss ON s.tcm_symptom_id = ss.tcm_symptom_id WHERE ss.tcm_syndrome_id = #{tcmSyndromeId} ORDER BY s.id ASC

SELECT h.id, h.tcm_herb_id AS tcmHerbId, h.herb_name_zh AS herbNameZh, h.pinyin_name AS pinyinName, h.latin_name AS latinName, h.english_name AS englishName, h.type, h.efficacy_zh AS efficacyZh, h.function_en AS functionEn, h.efficacy_category AS efficacyCategory FROM core_tcm_herbs h INNER JOIN herb_syndrome_rel hs ON h.tcm_herb_id = hs.tcm_herb_id WHERE hs.tcm_syndrome_id = #{tcmSyndromeId} ORDER BY h.id ASC

SELECT p.id, p.tcm_prescription_id AS tcmPrescriptionId, p.name_zh AS nameZh, p.pinyin_name AS pinyinName, p.source, p.indications_zh AS indicationsZh, p.indications_en AS indicationsEn, p.effects, p.effects_zh AS effectsZh FROM tcm_prescriptions p INNER JOIN prescription_syndrome_rel ps ON p.tcm_prescription_id = ps.tcm_prescription_id WHERE ps.tcm_syndrome_id = #{tcmSyndromeId} ORDER BY p.id ASC

SELECT syn.id, syn.tcm_syndrome_id AS tcmSyndromeId, syn.syndrome_name_zh AS syndromeNameZh, syn.syndrome_english AS syndromeEnglish, syn.syndrome_pinyin AS syndromePinyin, syn.syndrome_definition_zh AS syndromeDefinitionZh, syn.syndrome_description_en AS syndromeDescriptionEn, syn.category_zh AS categoryZh, syn.category_en AS categoryEn, syn.source FROM tcm_syndromes syn INNER JOIN herb_syndrome_rel hs ON syn.tcm_syndrome_id = hs.tcm_syndrome_id WHERE hs.tcm_herb_id = #{tcmHerbId} ORDER BY syn.id ASC
